title: R language-based methods for revealing taxonomic and functional diversity and tracing process of fish fauna
author: Kang, Huang, et al.
description: Graphical abstractThe figure showed the spatial pattern of an integrated index of multifaceted diversity in the Yangtze River Basin, considering the higher fish species richness and functional contribution. Headwater (characterized by abundant endemic species), the middle mainstream (necessary to fish migration), and the lakes (showing higher diverse species) were primary zones for conservation.
